mule.xsi:schemaLocation: http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file/current/mule-file.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/batch/current/mule-batch.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/jms http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/jms/current/mule-jms.xsd

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var rows = if (payload is Array) payload else read(payload, "application/csv") --- rows map (row) -> { ItemId: (row.ItemId as Number), LocationId: (row.LocationId default null) as String, RegionalStock: ((row.RegionalStock default 0) as Number), LastUpdatedAt: if ((row.LastUpdatedAt default null) != null) ((row.LastUpdatedAt as String) replace "T" with " " replace "Z" with "") else null }

db:select.db:sql: SELECT on_hand, reserved FROM inventory_db.warehouse_stock WHERE item_id = :ItemId AND location_id = :LocationId LIMIT 1;

logger.message: #['Processing Item=' ++ (payload.ItemId as String) ++ ' Location=' ++ (payload.LocationId as String) ++ ' Stock=' ++ (payload.RegionalStock as String) ++ ' Updated=' ++ (payload.LastUpdatedAt as String)]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var db = (vars.dbRow default [])[0] default {} var onhand = (db.onhand default 0) as Number var reserved = (db.reserved default 0) as Number var regional = (payload.RegionalStock default 0) as Number var warehouse = onhand - reserved --- { ItemId: payload.ItemId, LocationId: payload.LocationId, WarehouseStock: warehouse, RegionalStock: regional, TotalInventory: warehouse + regional, LastUpdatedAt: payload.LastUpdatedAt }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set Variable

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- [{ ItemId__c: vars.sfRow.ItemId as String, WarehouseStock__c: vars.sfRow.WarehouseStock, RegionalStock__c: vars.sfRow.RegionalStock, TotalInventory__c: vars.sfRow.TotalInventory, Status__c: if ((vars.sfRow.TotalInventory default 0) < 10) "LowStock" else if ((vars.sfRow.TotalInventory default 0) > 100) "HighStock" else "Normal" }]

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- [{ ItemId__c: vars.sfRow.ItemId as String, WarehouseStock__c: vars.sfRow.WarehouseStock, RegionalStock__c: vars.sfRow.RegionalStock, TotalInventory__c: vars.sfRow.TotalInventory, Status__c: if ((vars.sfRow.TotalInventory default 0) < 10) "LowStock" else if ((vars.sfRow.TotalInventory default 0) > 100) "HighStock" else "Normal" }]

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO inventory_db.warehouse_stock (item_id, location_id, regional_stock, last_updated_at) VALUES (:ItemId, :LocationId, :RegionalStock, :LastUpdatedAt) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE regional_stock = VALUES(regional_stock), last_updated_at = VALUES(last_updated_at);

logger.message: #["Batch Job Finished. Total: " ++ payload.totalRecords ++ ", Successful: " ++ payload.successfulRecords ++ ", Failed: " ++ payload.failedRecords]
